evals.prompt: Master requirements at apps/erp/docs/versions/3.0.0/ has 18 features — partition into subversions.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates version-roadmap.md, subversion folders with excerpt requirements, no task files.

evals.prompt: Split version 2.5.0 requirements respecting Feature precedence auth before billing.
evals.expected_output: Agent builds DAG, auth slice before billing in deps column, topological folder order.

evals.prompt: Partition produced only 2-task slices — consolidate per skill rules.
evals.expected_output: Agent merges undersized adjacent slices when no structural blocker, targets 4-7 tasks per slice.
